{{Quote|If you're considering joining the Rebellion, then consider teaming up with a Fighter Group that's proven itself over and over in combat. Consider Blue Group. Join our team and be Second to None.|E-mail message from Chez Ulan|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Chez Ulan''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and recruiter for a group of [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] known as Blue Group, shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. He once sent out an e-mail message to Alliance recruits urging them to join Blue Group.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
